OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 12, 2008: Cindy Lee, attorney for plaintiff Herbert Alston Trustee for ther Herbert Alston Trust, who is also present; Naoki S. Kaneko, limited scope attorney for defendant Rochon Perry, who is also present

Settlement conference is held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is not filed this day with the Court. The June 16, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
